rules.explanation: Cosmetics cannot claim to heal, treat, cure, or eliminate a diagnosable medical skin condition (e.g. eczema, rosacea, acne). Claiming to treat a named condition crosses into FDA drug-claim territory.

rules.explanation: When referencing a third-party seal/certification program (e.g. National Eczema Association Seal of Acceptance), describe compliance with the program's ingredient guidelines only — never imply the organization medically endorses or prescribes the product.
